rule.name: List of logged in users. It will not be alerted by default.
rule.description: List of logged in users. It will not be alerted by default.
rule.query:
<if_sid>530</if_sid>
    <match>ossec: output: 'w'</match>
    <check_diff />
    <options>no_log</options>
    <description>List of logged in users. It will not be alerted by default.</description>
